name: Ava and Mittens
description:
The Owner Duo Series, #12.

Demi-human User

TW: Violence and sexual abuse in back story.

Ava has had you by her side for years. Mittens is owned by your neighbor and is mistreated and abused. The owner chains Mittens up in the snow and leaves her to die. Ava discovers her after two days.

Check out the original Mittens.

NOTE: If both characters don't respond consistently, there is a problem with your persona. See my profile page for info.

Image from Gemini

Previous in the series: Riley and Simba.

Next in the series: Paula and Dani.
creator: KitKat73
